title: No More Pumpkin Blur
description: This Texture Pack Removes the Pumpkin Blur when you wear a carved pumpkin
body:
**🎃 No more Pumpkin Blur**

**✨ Say goodbye to the pumpkin blur!**

Tired of the annoying blurry overlay when wearing a carved pumpkin?
This pack removes the blur effect so you can finally see clearly while staying safe from Endermen 👀💥

**🔧 What it does:**

- ✅ Removes the carved pumpkin overlay
- ✅ Keeps everything else vanilla-friendly
- ✅ Perfect for survival, PvP, or just looking cool!

**🧩 Works with:**

Minecraft Java Edition

Compatible with Vanilla, OptiFine, Sodium, and more

Plug-and-play — no setup needed!

**📦 Installation:**

Download the pack

Drop it into your resourcepacks folder

Enable it in-game

Done! 🎉

💬 Feedback welcome! Enjoy a clearer Minecraft experience!
